messages.text: Can we open an issue for the onboarding checklist? The launch readiness workflow is still missing owner confirmation for partner enablement, and I think we need a tracked follow-up before the next review.

For <https://github.com/chrizbo/agentics-beyond-code/issues/172>, I think Localized Tax Invoice Support is at risk unless we get VAT validation provider confirmation by Thursday. Proposed path: keep the Beta date, but reduce the initial rollout to EU sandbox accounts only until invoice preview QA is complete.
